get.description: Liveness: process is up. Dependency-light (no DB) on purpose.

Readiness: checks the DB so orchestration can gate traffic without
coupling liveness to it. 200 when ready, 503 when degraded.

parameters.name: metric

schema.description: e.g. steps | stress | spo2 | heart_rate | energy_expenditure
schema.title: Metric

parameters.description: e.g. steps | stress | spo2 | heart_rate | energy_expenditure

schema.title: Response List Points Api V1 Telemetry Get
Response Daily Rollup Api V1 Telemetry Daily Get
Response List Training Api V1 Training Get

post.description: Log sets against a session; free-text exercise names resolve to the catalog.

schema.title: Response Search Exercises Api V1 Exercises Get

post.description: Manual meal entry. Items with grams but no macros are resolved via nutrition_core.

Photo meal entry: proxied to image-svc. If the GPU box is unreachable the
response is a degraded empty manual meal (never a 5xx).

Add items to a meal by catalog food (portion×qty or grams), free-text food +
grams, or a raw kcal-only quick entry.

schema.title: Response Search Foods Api V1 Foods Get
Response Recent Foods Api V1 Foods Recent Get

parameters.name: name

schema.description: Typed food name to resolve via the matcher.
schema.title: Name

parameters.description: Typed food name to resolve via the matcher.

get.description: Today's recommendations. Generated + stored lazily on first request for a day.

post.description: Force a regenerate + store (the daily-pass trigger).

get.description:
One call powering the frontend home: telemetry summary + training + nutrition
totals + recommendations for the day.

post.description:
Import complementary telemetry from a Samsung Health export.

Routes each file by its metadata line-1 data type; unknown types are reported
as skipped, not errors. Upload the sleep_stage file alongside sleep to enrich
deep/awake stage minutes. Idempotent: re-uploading the same export is safe.

files.title: Files
files.description: One or more Samsung Health export CSVs.

DailyRollup.title: DailyRollup
DailyRollup.description:
One day's rollup for a metric. `sum` is meaningful for additive metrics
(steps, energy_expenditure); `avg`/`min`/`max` for the rest.

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: When the meal was eaten (UTC ISO; naive assumed UTC).

MealItemAddIn.title: MealItemAddIn
MealItemAddIn.description:
Add an item by catalog food (food_id) with a portion×qty or grams, by
free-text food + grams (matcher-resolved), or a raw kcal-only quick entry.

food.title: Food
food.description: Food name; resolved against nutrition_core when macros omitted.

ts.title: Ts
ts.description: Session start (UTC ISO; naive is assumed UTC).

load.title: Load
load.description: Optional; auto-computed as duration_min × rpe when omitted.
